# projectReassignStatus

[INTERNAL] Updates all projects currently assigned to to a project status to a new project status.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`SuccessPayload`](../objects/success_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `newProjectStatusId` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The identifier of the new project status to update the projects to. |
| `originalProjectStatusId` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The identifier of the project status with which projects will be updated. |
